# Security Policy

## Reporting a vulnerability

If you discover a security issue in `wizcodepl/lunar-product-schemas`, please **do not** open a public GitHub issue.

Instead, email **security@wizcode.pl** with:
- A description of the issue
- Steps to reproduce (or a minimal proof-of-concept)
- The package version affected
- Your assessment of impact

You should receive an acknowledgement within 72 hours. We will keep you informed of progress toward a fix and a coordinated disclosure timeline.

## Supported versions

Only the latest minor version receives security fixes. Once a new minor is tagged, the previous minor is no longer supported.
